description.quote: "When the sun rises red, it is not the light that arrives — it is the hunger."
description.appearance: A wave of hunched, crimson-robed figures that move in jerking, erratic patterns. Their faces are obscured by cracked white masks. They carry no weapons but their hands end in elongated black talons.

observations: Spawns at facility perimeter — 6 units observed in the single encounter so far.
Move toward the highest employee density, ignoring abnormality cells entirely.
Each talon strike deals [4 🔴 Red Damage]. They attack twice per turn.
Employees at the front of a corridor take all hits — positioning matters significantly.
Hypothesis (unconfirmed): May be deterred by Pale damage — one unit appeared to flinch and reroute when struck.

description.quote: "They sing because they have forgotten how to be silent."
description.appearance: Tall, translucent blue entities that glide rather than walk. Their mouths are permanently open in a silent scream. They wear tattered formal wear — suits and gowns — suggesting they were once human.
